title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Account linked to the Tenant to Account with pending invite
scenario: Tenant info is not cleared from Support screen when switching from a Tenant-linked account to an account with a pending invite
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in with an Account that is linked to Tenant A.
4. Tap the Poly Lens Menu (hamburger menu or menu icon).
6. Observe the App section on the Support screen.
7. Log out of the current Account.
8. Log in with a different Account that has a pending invite but is not yet linked to any Tenant.
10. Tap the Poly Lens Menu (hamburger menu or menu icon).
12. Observe the App section on the Support screen.
expected: After step 6: The App section displays Tenant A name and ID. After step 12: The App section does NOT display any Tenant name or ID (tenant info is cleared).
